title: cordia brachycalyx
intro: Cordia brachycalyx, also known as the "wild lime" or "beefwood", is a tropical plant native to the Americas, belonging to the bignonia family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordia brachycalyx include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wound healing. Cordia brachycalyx can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to make traditional medicine in various parts of Latin America.
